name: Title
desc: Displays titles/subtitles on screen with animation timing. Actions: TITLE, SUBTITLE, TIMES, CLEAR, RESET.

implementation.overview: S45PacketTitle displays screen titles with five actions. TITLE and SUBTITLE set the text. TIMES configures fade-in/stay/fade-out duration. CLEAR removes immediately. RESET clears + resets to defaults. Used by servers for minigame countdowns, join messages, boss announcements. AntiTitle modules cancel S45 to hide all titles from the HUD.

modules.name: AntiTitle / TitleHider (Gugustus / Tenacity 6.0)
modules.purpose: Cancel S45PacketTitle to prevent titles from displaying on screen. Useful when titles block the HUD or give unwanted visual noise.
modules.how_it_works: In EventReceivePacket, if the packet is S45PacketTitle, cancel it. The title never appears on screen. This also cancels subtitles and title animation timing.

implementation.general_hooks:
Client: NetHandlerPlayClient.handleTitle(S45PacketTitle). AntiTitle cancels to hide all titles.

Server: Server side sends this for event announcements.
